title: Login test: use --password-stdin
body:
Great timing: this new test collided against #5268, which added
a warning about using command-line --password. CI is now going
to fail all over.

Fix: rework test to use --password-stdin. Am doing so only
in the places where output string is checked; other instances
can keep using '--password xxx' because it's simpler.

Signed-off-by: Ed Santiago <santiago@redhat.com>

comments.body: Sorry everyone; this is super-urgent because without it CI will be blocked on all PRs. Any open PRs will probable need to be rebased once this merges.
To be precise: any PRs based against e7d8bda8 or later will need to be rebased. Any open PRs based against earlier master are fine.

[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *edsantiago*, *mheon* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Flibpod). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/libpod/blob/master/OWNERS)~~ [mheon] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment

Barn door has been closed, but LGTM
thanks for the quick turn around @edsantiago
